title: JAIL INFORMATION - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE JAIL INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates two correctional facilities that provide the safe and secure confinement of adults in custody. Assists families in locating an adult in custody within the Multnomah County Corrections system. Provides in-person and video visitation opportunities for adults in custody and visitors. Processes bail and commissary transactions. 234 SW Kendall Court Troutdale, OR 97060 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Jail information: Online 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email - (503) 823-3333 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Non-Emergency (503) 823-3333 Jail Information Line (503) 988-3689 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call jail information line to find out if someone is being held in the county jail facility FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement through the website searching "request an accommodation" AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 77 and 81 with a bus stop 2 blocks away Services: County Correctional Facilities Prisoner Locator Services Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - LAW ENFORCEMENT DIVISION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE
